title: 2021 Dry Bulk Outlook Iron Ore
summary:
Main
By Peter Lindström
In the following weeks Klaveness Research will in a series of articles have a look at how we believe the fundamentals impacting dry bulk freight rates are shaping up for 2021. In last week's article we started off by having a look at the big picture. In this week's article we will drill further into the details of the fundamental drivers for iron ore, which is the single biggest dry bulk commodity.
